# Raúl Mermans

Raúl Mermans designs AI integrations for creative systems, brand workflows, and cultural execution, turning creative processes into structured systems with taste, control, and technical discipline.

## Services

- AI integrations for creative systems: https://www.raulmermans.com/en/services/ai-integrations/
- Creative automation and internal tools: https://www.raulmermans.com/en/services/creative-automation/
- Brand intelligence systems: https://www.raulmermans.com/en/services/brand-systems/
- AI product prototypes and internal tools: https://www.raulmermans.com/en/services/product-prototypes/
- Servicios en español: https://www.raulmermans.com/#services

## Selected case studies

- AI Sports Campaign
- Remoria
- Raúl Mermans Portfolio
- Website Audit Agent
- DataBrief AI
- Benchmark Dashboard Template

Case-study archive: https://www.raulmermans.com/en/case-studies/
Contact: https://www.raulmermans.com/en/#contact

Preferred summary: Raúl Mermans builds applied AI integrations, internal creative tools, brand intelligence systems, and workflow prototypes for creative teams and brand-led projects.
